```{=html}
<div style="width:84%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.2em 1em 1.3em;border-radius:18px;">

 <!-- premise: randomness can't be removed, only cornered -->
 <div style="background:#FFFBF3;border:1px solid #EFE6D6;border-radius:12px;padding:0.6em 1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.6em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.08);">
  <i data-lucide="lightbulb" style="width:1.1em;height:1.1em;stroke-width:1.9;color:#5654A2;flex-shrink:0;"></i>
  <div style="font-size:0.52em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.45;">Randomness <strong style="color:#D45F47;">can't be turned off</strong>. The workaround: <strong style="color:#2C8475;">shrink the space</strong> it can act in.</div>
 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.15fr;gap:1em;align-items:center;margin-top:0.9em;">

  <!-- the matched set -->
  <div style="display:flex;gap:0.8em;justify-content:center;">
   <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.6em;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(44,62,80,0.12);border:1px solid #EFE6D6;">
    <img src="figs/cooking-oil.png" alt="Cooking oil icon" style="width:5.2em;height:5.2em;object-fit:contain;display:block;border-radius:9px;" />
   </div>
   <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.6em;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(44,62,80,0.12);border:1px solid #EFE6D6;">
    <img src="figs/light-soy-sauce.png" alt="Light soy sauce icon" style="width:5.2em;height:5.2em;object-fit:contain;display:block;border-radius:9px;" />
   </div>
  </div>

  <!-- how each part gets pinned -->
  <div style="text-align:left;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.5em;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.6em;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.8em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(44,132,117,0.22);">
    <i data-lucide="image" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.9;color:#2C8475;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:0.1em;"></i>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;"><strong style="color:#2C8475;">Template:</strong> image-to-image against a reference pins the bottle, cork, and framing.</div>
   </div>
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.6em;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.8em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(44,132,117,0.22);">
    <i data-lucide="file-code" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.9;color:#2C8475;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:0.1em;"></i>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;"><strong style="color:#2C8475;">Script:</strong> a Python script composites the label text, identical every run.</div>
   </div>
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.6em;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.8em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(212,95,71,0.22);">
    <i data-lucide="shuffle" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.9;color:#D45F47;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:0.1em;"></i>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;"><strong style="color:#D45F47;">Left random:</strong> only the liquid, which should differ in color and texture.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;text-align:center;font-size:0.48em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.5;">
  The reader just sees a matched set.
 </div>

</div>
```
